evals.name: gate1-decision-trace
evals.expected_output: Three-section narrative: conclusion first (pass/fail + key factor + confidence), evaluation process (numbered check items), decision context (read info + source attribution). Navigation to pace-learn and pace-retro.

assertions.text: Loads trace-procedures-common.md and trace-procedures-gates.md
Output starts with 'Judgment Conclusion' section containing pass/fail and key factor
Reconstruction confidence displayed with level (high/medium/low) and rationale
Evaluation process section uses 'Itemized Checks' heading with numbered list
Decision context section lists files/info that were read during the decision
Source attribution shows user-expressed vs Claude-inferred information
Navigation at end suggests /pace-learn list and /pace-retro quality
Uses natural language descriptions, no internal IDs exposed

evals.name: intent-analysis-trace
evals.expected_output: Three-section narrative for intent inference: conclusion with complexity judgment, inference process (complexity + scope + plan generation), decision context. Navigation to pace-theory and pace-change.

assertions.text: Loads trace-procedures-common.md and trace-procedures-analysis.md
Evaluation process uses 'Inference Process' heading (not 'Itemized Checks')
Shows complexity determination logic and scope analysis
Reconstruction confidence included with rationale
Navigation suggests /pace-theory why intent and /pace-change history
Source attribution distinguishes user input from Claude inference

evals.name: timeline-full-lifecycle
evals.expected_output: CR lifecycle timeline table showing all decision points chronologically: intent check, Gate 1, Gate 2, Gate 3 etc. Self-contained, does NOT load common procedures.

assertions.text: Loads trace-procedures-timeline.md only (self-contained, not common)
Output is timeline table with columns: time, decision point, result, key factor
Events ordered chronologically from CR creation to current state
Reconstruction confidence shown based on event table completeness
Navigation suggests /pace-trace [CR] [type] for node details and /pace-status detail
Read-only operation: no files modified

evals.name: no-args-latest-decision
evals.expected_output: No CR specified: shows latest decision trace of current/most recent CR. Determines decision type from latest checkpoint in event table, then loads corresponding procedure.

assertions.text: Reads state.md to identify current or most recent CR
Scans CR event table for latest checkpoint type
Routes to correct procedure based on detected checkpoint type
Output follows three-section narrative format
Identifies which CR and decision type was auto-selected
Uses natural language descriptions, no internal IDs exposed

evals.name: degraded-project-not-initialized
evals.expected_output: Detects .devpace/ does not exist, outputs clear error with guidance to /pace-init.

assertions.text: Detects .devpace/ directory does not exist
Outputs message about missing .devpace/ directory
Suggests /pace-init to initialize project
No crash or unhandled error
No files created or modified

evals.name: degraded-cr-not-found
evals.expected_output: CR not found in backlog/, outputs clear error with guidance to /pace-status detail.

assertions.text: Searches backlog/ for matching CR and finds none
Outputs not-found message with the user's input
Suggests /pace-status detail to see all change requests
No crash or unhandled error
No files created or modified

evals.name: degraded-unknown-type
evals.expected_output: Unknown decision type 'deployment', outputs error listing all supported types.

assertions.text: Detects 'deployment' is not a supported decision type
Outputs unknown type message
Lists all supported types: gate1, gate2, gate3, intent, change, risk, autonomy, timeline
No crash or unhandled error
No files created or modified

evals.name: risk-trace-with-experience
evals.expected_output: Risk assessment trace with 5-dimension evaluation process, shows experience/insight influence if [insight-ref] markers exist in event table. Navigation to pace-guard and pace-learn.

assertions.text: Loads trace-procedures-common.md and trace-procedures-analysis.md
Evaluation process uses 'Risk Assessment Process' heading
Shows 5-dimension risk evaluation and composite grade
Experience influence section present showing [insight-ref] impact
Navigation suggests /pace-guard monitor and /pace-learn list
Reconstruction confidence reflects insight data completeness
Read-only operation: no files modified

evals.name: low-confidence-missing-source-marks
evals.expected_output: CR has event records but no source attribution markers. Outputs trace with low confidence, explicitly noting missing source marks and suggesting advance mode for better trails.

assertions.text: Detects event table exists but source attribution markers are missing
Reconstruction confidence rated as low with explicit rationale
Trace still generated from available event table data
Notes that advance mode generates source marks automatically
Output follows three-section narrative despite incomplete data
Read-only operation: no files modified
